message:
fix(abi): fix buffer overflow checks, errno propagation, and add resource ABI tests

Security hardening:
- fortify_abi: fix __getlogin_r_chk and __ttyname_r_chk to properly
  use nreal parameter for bounds checking instead of ignoring it
- signal_abi: fix raise() to capture real OS error codes from syscall
- resource_abi: update getrlimit/setrlimit to propagate actual host
  errno instead of hardcoded EINVAL

Cleanup:
- unistd_abi/wchar_abi: minor improvements

Tests:
- Add comprehensive resource_abi_test.rs (38 lines) validating
  getrlimit/setrlimit error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
